test.note: Tests pass; 'ELIFECYCLE Command failed' is from a pre-test pnpm install failure in a worktree test fixture (not a test failure). 158 test files passed with 9 passed summary.

typecheck.note: All 20 workspace packages typecheck passed in 240s

lint.note: No packages have a lint script (exit code 0)

build.note: UI, server, and CLI built successfully in 35.40s

nonBlockingIssues: In resumeFromCheckpoint action, restoring 'running' status from a checkpoint could be confusing if users expect runs to always resume as 'pending' — but this is correct checkpoint/resume semantics
updateConvoyTaskStatus re-unblocking only runs when newStatus === 'passed' — correct, non-blocking
KnowledgeSection uses inline type union instead of importing exported KnowledgeType from constants.ts — minor redundancy, no error
Variable naming 'competingRunWarnings' could be more descriptive — no functional issue
Branch-base comparison is a heuristic that may miss overlapping branches like 'feature/a' vs 'feature/a/b' — acceptable for scope
UI derives conflicts client-side from locks array without calling checkMergeConflict action — acceptable but worth expanding if lock criteria grow
Compete warning does not suppress when hasActiveLock, so both badges could appear simultaneously — color coding handles hierarchy
Feature description mentioned findProductLockForTarget but worker correctly used findBlockingLock (the function that actually exists and is used by reference handlers) — justified deviation
findActiveProductLock imported but not used — unused import, no functional impact
productLocks data handler doesn't filter by isActive: true — consistent with reference handlers, non-blocking

appliedUpdates.description: Document that 'pnpm -r lint' returns 0 with no lint script in most packages — lint check is effectively a no-op pass for this project structure

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Add 'agent-browser' CLI command documentation: agent-browser is available for browser automation and UI verification in worker sessions (used for browser-visible feature validation). Workers should use --session with unique session IDs.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: Feature advanced-ui-surfaces-035-041 and merge-coordination-ui-fix used agent-browser for UI verification. The tool is installed on the VPS but not documented in services.yaml.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Add plugin build command documentation: for packages/plugins/examples/plugin-autoresearch-improver, use 'node ./esbuild.config.mjs' instead of 'pnpm build' which is the root workspace command. The root 'pnpm build' runs all workspace builds and may not apply to plugin-only changes.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: Feature merge-coordination-ui-fix and product-lock-backend-wiring used 'node ./esbuild.config.mjs' in the plugin directory to rebuild the plugin.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Clarify the 'build' step in skill procedures: for plugin-only features, does 'pnpm build' mean root build (all workspaces) or plugin-specific esbuild rebuild? The backend-worker skill says 'Run typecheck, tests, and build before marking done' but build was not run for plugin-only changes in prior sessions.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: Feature advanced-ui-surfaces-035-041 ran typecheck and tests but not build. Handoff verification shows no build step. AGENTS.md rule 7 lists 'pnpm build' but this may not apply to plugin-only changes.
